name: TestIso11783IL_OPChangeSoftKeyMask
title: TestIso11783IL_OPChangeSoftKeyMask
description: If parameter maskType is not used the mask type is determined by the mask object.
tables: long TestIso11783IL_OPChangeSoftKeyMask( dbNode node, dword maskID, dword softKeyMaskID ); // form 1
long TestIso11783IL_OPChangeSoftKeyMask( dbNode node, dword maskType, dword maskID, dword softKeyMaskID ); // form 2

The function changes the soft key mask of a data mask. A Change Soft Key Mask command is sent to the Virtual Terminal. If parameter maskType is not used the mask type is determined by the mask object. Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.
node Simulation node to apply the function.
maskID object ID of the data mask
softkeyMaskID object ID of the data mask
maskType type of mask 1: data mask 2: alarm mask
0: function has been executed successfully <0: an error has occurred, see error codes
